desc:
When no portrait frame is set
<color=#92fc63>and when an oathed ship is set as secretary ship, the oath portrait frame is displayable.</color>
name: Default Appearance

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Happy 1st Anniversary!</color>
Unlocked by using the New Dawn item.
name: 1st Anniversary

 (earned by participating in the 2nd Anniversary limited event)

<color=#A7A7AA>May our next thousand days together be just as memorable!</color>
A special chat frame awarded for Azur Lane's 1,000-day launch celebration.
name: 1000 Days Commemoration

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Commemorates your triumph over the Incarnation of Taurus. Presented to Commanders who demonstrated the courage to challenge their limits.</color> 
<color=#A7A7AAFF>Obtained from [Extreme Challenge] during the 5/1/24 - 5/31/24 Season.</color>
name: Extreme Challenge - Taurus

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Can be unlocked by collecting points from Returnee Missions. </color>
(Lasts for 30 days)
name: Leader

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Welcome back to the Admiralty, Commander. We expect great things from you.</color>
(Lasts for 30 days)
name: Returnee

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Red blood and cold iron temper our indomitable will."</color>
Obtained from the "Scherzo of Iron and Blood" event.
name: The Iron Blood Oath

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"For our azure freedom! God bless the Eagle Union!"</color>
Obtained from the "Ashen Simulacrum" event.
name: Wings of Freedom

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Display the glory and dignity of the Sardegna Empire to the whole world!"</color>
Obtained from the "Empyreal Tragicomedy" event.
name: Insignia of Glory

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"With this offering, we pray for a bright future for the Sakura Empire."</color>
Obtained from the "Swirling Cherry Blossoms" event.
name: Sakura Ceremony

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Unite, comrades! The world is ours to change!"</color>
Obtained from the "Northern Overture" event.
name: Proof of Solidarity

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"O, fearless thunderbolts of liberty! Guide us through the darkness!"</color>
Obtained from the "Microlayer Medley" event.
name: Wings of Lightning

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"May numerous hymns cross the seas to reach the skies... Vive la Iris!"</color>
Obtained from the "Skybound Oratorio" event.
name: Iris Canto

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"For the glory of Her Majesty and the Royal Navy!"</color>
Obtained from the "Aurora Noctis" event.
name: Royal Crown

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame designed with Laffey's motifs.</color>
Obtained from the 2nd Anniversary event.
name: Laffey's Gift

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"May the light of hope shine forevermore, whether in reality or in a dream."</color>
Obtained from "Dreamwaker's Butterfly" event.
name: Illusory Butterfly

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"May my red blood flow into the frigid mold of war."</color>
Obtained from the "Inverted Orthant" event.
name: Weapon of the Iron Blood

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"The Sirens' secrets shall dance in the palm of our hand!"</color>
Obtained from the "Khorovod of Dawn's Rime" event.
name: Seal of Dawn's Rime

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Come, and become a pillar for our reborn empire! Let us seize glory together! "</color>
Obtained from the "Daedalian Hymn" event.
name: Pride of Sardegna

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>The indomitable Black Dragon of the Eagle Union has arrived! Together, let us shake the foundations of this world!</color>
Obtained from the "Mirror involution" event.
name: Voltaic Lightwings

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Well, this is SOME kind of treasure, I suppose."</color>
Obtained from the "Upon the Shimmering Blue" event.
name: Ryugu's Acknowledgment

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>A bridge that spans beyond reality. Is it Heaven or Hell that awaits us on the other side?</color>Obtained from the "Tower of Transcendence" event.
name: Mark of Transcendence

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>An award given by Sovetsky Soyuz to soldiers who went above and beyond.</color>
 Obtained from the "Abyssal Refrain" event.
name: Seal of the Polar Star

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Beyond the open door lies a new future.</color>
Obtained from the "Rondo at Rainbow's End" event
name: Singularity at Rainbow's End

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>War and time may take their tolls, but our pledges will shine on like stars in the night sky.</color>
Obtained from the "Pledge of the Radiant Court" event.
name: Seal of the Radiant Court

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Though its path may be filled with thorns, the aquila of Sette Colli still spreads its wings and takes flight.</color>
Obtained from the "Aquilifer's Ballade" event.
name: Splendor of Sardegna

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"From sea of cloud comes lonely rays, as fleeting as the morning haze. From its scabbard does heavenly sword draw, a violet flash sundering sky, earth, and all."</color>
Obtained from the "Violet Tempest, Blooming Lycoris" event.
name: Violet Lightning Storm

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Space and time intertwine amidst spinning rings, and destiny converges within the pillar of light."</color>
Obtained from the "Parallel Superimposition" event.
name: Sea of Stars Loop

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"It is not Divinity we seek, but rather the light of Her Majesty's blessings–"</color>
Obtained from the "Revelations of Dust" event.
name: Seal of Divine Refulgence

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"On the prophesied day, fall into raging flames and billowing waves––"</color>
Awarded to Commanders who participated in the "Confluence of Nothingness" event.
name: Norn's Synthetic Loop

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Even without laurels atop their head, those who uphold true faith shall be crowned with victory."</color>
–"The Fool's Scales" event reward.
name: Unbestowed Crown

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Life, even if brief, is hard to substitute–"</color>
Obtained from the "Effulgence Before Eclipse" event.
name: Wisteria Seal

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"The heaven that covers all, the causality that replicates the world. Cross the line in the sand and let the eternal truth be impressed upon all."</color>
Obtained from the "Light-Chasing Sea of Stars" event.
name: Light-Chasing Ring of Stars

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Through the snow, across the icebergs, look at yourself and witness the future."</color>
Given to Commanders who excelled during the "Snowrealm Peregrination" event.
name: Star of the Snowrealm

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"I will continue choosing to protect, even in a transient dream."</color>
Given to Commanders who participated in the "Light of the Martyrium" event.
name: Dreambound Martyr

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A resplendent heart that never stops. A gale of iron blowing through the waves.</color>
Given to Commanders who participated in the Windborne Steel Wings event.
name: Resplendent Heart

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"The phoenix dances when the fox roars, bathing in flames and receiving new flesh. Though lives change, memories do not."</color> 
Given to Commanders who participated in the Ode of Everblooming Crimson event.
name: Flames of Resurrection

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Everything in the cosmos falls under the stars' brilliant gaze."</color>
Given to Commanders who participated in the Substellar Crepuscule event.
name: Starlight From Beyond

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Pick up the brush, and paint your own light."</color>
Given to Commanders who participated in the Paradiso of Shackled Light.
name: A Stroke of Divine Light: Bastion of Saintly Wings

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"From atop the high tower, the rose continues to protect the Royal Navy's final glory."</color>
Given to Commanders who participated in the A Rose on the High Tower.
gain_by: A Rose on the High Tower
name: Rosen Vow

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Upon my first arrival in the Sky Realm, I heard a phoenix's cry. Past me it flew, its voice echoing throughout Amahara."</color>
Given to Commanders who participated in the A Dance for Amahara Above event.
name: Phoenix's Call for Amahara

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"We meet again, Commander. I'm back."</color>
Obtained from the A Note Through the Firmament event.
name: Ghost of the Dark Blue

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Laffey.</color>
Obtained through the Azur Lane 2021 Popularity Poll.
name: Hall of Fame: Laffey

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Amagi.</color>
Obtained through the Azur Lane 2021 Popularity Poll.
name: Hall of Fame: Amagi

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Bismarck.</color>
Obtained through the Azur Lane 2021 Popularity Poll.
name: Hall of Fame: Bismarck

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate New Jersey.</color>
Obtained from the Azur Lane Popularity Poll 2023.
name: Hall of Fame: New Jersey

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Shinano.</color>

Obtained from the Azur Lane Popularity Poll 2025.
name: Hall of Fame: Shinano

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Prinz Eugen.</color>
Obtained from the Azur Lane Popularity Poll 2023.
name: Hall of Fame: Prinz Eugen

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Friedrich der Große.</color>
Obtained from the Azur Lane Popularity Poll 2023.
name: Hall of Fame: Friedrich der Große

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Ägir.</color>

Obtained from the Azur Lane Popularity Poll 2025.
name: Hall of Fame: Ägir

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A special portrait frame made to commemorate Kearsarge.</color>

Obtained from the Azur Lane Popularity Poll 2025.
name: Hall of Fame: Kearsarge

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Let your love for delicious pizza be known by all!</color>
―Obtained in the "Manjuu Pizzeria" event.
name: Manjuu Pizzeria Frame

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>I scream, you scream, we all scream for ice cream.</color>
Obtained from the "Manjuu Ice Cream" event.
name: A Song of Ice and Cream

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Set sail for the best deserted island vacation ever!</color>
Awarded to Commanders who participated in the "Uncharted Summer" event.
name: Summer and Seabreeze

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A commemorative frame that brings back memories of laughter and champagne.</color>
–"Castle of Celebrations" event reward.
name: Effervescent Emblem

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>Proof of all the exercise you did and the sweat you perspirated.</color>
name: Fitness Aficionado

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Victory belongs to who reaches the goal fastest.</color>
Awarded to Commanders who participated in the "High-Speed Raceway" event.
name: Seal of the Speedster

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>Feel the breeze, take in the sun, and enjoy yourself!</color> Obtained in the "Pleasure, Leisure, and Treasure" event.
name: Ring of Leisure

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>No one can escape their own story. Not even a free-spirited rider.</color> Given to Commanders who participated in the Wild West Vacation Log event.
name: A Trip to the Prairie

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>"Thank you for taking part in the Black Friday campaign, nya!"</color> 
Obtained from 2024 Black Friday Akashi's Fire Sale event.
name: Black Friday Frenzy

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>To a perfect vacation on the resort island!</color> Obtained by participating in the Midsummer Returns: The Villa Reconstruction event.
name: Resort Island Vacation

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>Take in the atmosphere and feel the wind blow through the trees on this extraordinary vacation.</color> Obtained by participating in the A Sylvan Retreat event.
name: Sylvan Breeze

desc: <color=#FFD40D>50% OFF Mega Sale, Black Friday extravaganza begins!</color>Obtained from Black Friday Cruise Missions.
name: Black Friday Extravaganza

desc: <color=#A7A7AA>Lanterns hung high light the way for wealth's path to your home, soon to be filled with good fortune.</color> Obtained by participating in the Springtide Inn Online event.
name: World's Greatest Inn

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>In every bite, a sweet and delectable memory.</color>
Obtained by raising Intimacy Level with Sirius in Private Quarters.
name: Sweet Rendezvous

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Whatever happens, there will always be a cup of warm tea quietly waiting for you.</color>
Obtained by raising Intimacy Level with Sirius in Private Quarters.
name: Afternoon Tea

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>The golden sakura in flight symbolizes a proud yet calm heart.</color>
Reward for raising Noshiro's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Style of the Golden Sakura

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>From underneath the Sakuran parasol, a pair of eyes gazes at you lovingly.</color>
Reward for raising Noshiro's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Floral Rain, Homecoming Bird, and You

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>The pure light of the stars makes an angel's halo shine.</color>
Reward for raising Anchorage's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Angelic Light

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Chase the waves and dive into a joyous new quest.</color>
Reward for raising Anchorage's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Adventure on the Blue Seas

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Under the stars and snow, two rabbits snuggle close to keep each other warm.</color>
Reward for raising New Jersey's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Stars and Snow

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Who's the bunny dancing in the neon spotlight?</color>
Reward for raising New Jersey's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Dazzling Steps

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Spread golden wings, your feathers radiating with light. Elegant, but mysterious.</color>
Obtained by raising Intimacy Level with Taihou in Private Quarters.
name: Cherry Blossoms Sing

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Petals dance in the wind, singing of the vitality and beauty of spring.</color>
Obtained by raising Intimacy Level with Taihou in Private Quarters.
name: Golden Phoenix's Radiance

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>From the abyss the ruthless dragon emerges, its black chains rippling with raging lightning.</color>
Can be obtained by raising Ägir's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Chains of the Depths

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>A steel-blue flag flutters amidst the surging waves, a golden crown placed atop it to symbolize its dominion over the sea.</color>
Can be obtained by raising Ägir's Intimacy in the Private Quarters.
name: Crown of the Blue Seas

desc:
<color=#A7A7AA>Commemorates your triumph over the Incarnation of Gemini. Presented to Commanders who demonstrated the courage to challenge their limits.</color>

name: Extreme Challenge - Gemini
